oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Training that sticks: Engaging, adapting and communicating across cultures
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Guerra Maupome, Mariana
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Protocols do not fail; execution does. For cattle veterinarians, improving on-farm outcomes requires shifting attention from protocol design alone to protocol implementation. Training should be treated as a continuous herd-health intervention that shapes how people work, not just what they do.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; No. 1 (2026): 2026 Recent Graduate Conference Proceedings; 17-18
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
